headline: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo and Uganda a global health emergency
summary: The World Health Organization has declared an Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda a public health emergency of international concern. At least six Americans have been exposed, with one experiencing symptoms.

headline: Trump warns 'clock is ticking' for Iran as peace progress stalls
summary: US President Trump has warned time is running out for Iran as peace negotiations stall. Iran stated it has responded to the latest US proposal and exchanges with Washington are continuing.

headline: Israeli forces board Gaza-bound flotilla near Cyprus
summary: Israeli commandos have boarded several boats from the Global Sumud flotilla attempting to breach the Gaza maritime blockade, according to activists and live broadcasts.

headline: Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region
summary: Russia reports three killed in a large-scale Ukrainian drone attack on the Moscow region. Ukraine's president called the strikes a 'justified' response to deadly Russian attacks on Ukrainian cities.

headline: Strike over high fuel prices paralyses transport in Kenya
summary: A strike over high fuel prices has paralyzed transport across Kenya, with key roads remaining largely empty and some schools asking students to stay home.

headline: Two US Navy jets collide mid-air at Idaho air show; crew ejects safely
summary: Four crew members safely ejected and are in stable condition after two US Navy fighter jets collided mid-air during an air show in Idaho.

headline: Long Island Rail Road workers strike, paralyzing NYC commuter system
summary: Thousands of New York commuters face chaos as Long Island Rail Road workers go on strike, shutting down the nation's busiest commuter rail system.

headline: Shakira wins £50m tax refund from Spanish government
summary: Colombian singer Shakira has won a £50 million tax refund from Spanish authorities. She stated the ruling means the narrative that she was guilty now 'crumbles'.

headline: Cruise ship hit by hantavirus outbreak docks in Rotterdam
summary: A cruise ship affected by a hantavirus outbreak has docked in Rotterdam, with crew members expected to self-isolate upon arrival at the Dutch port.

headline: China reveals future of driving at world's biggest auto show
summary: At the world's largest auto show, China has unveiled its vision for the future of driving, showcasing advanced electric and autonomous vehicle technologies.
